TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-frog2_waon a boong
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: 'aehoe' kita' ray binbinisitan 'izo' ka takem tobong.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ raj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ ka takəm toβoŋ.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' kita' ray binbinisitan 'izo' ka takem tobong.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ raj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ ka takəm toβoŋ.
S.TRANSL: 狗看著瓶子裡的青蛙叫.
A dog saw inside a container a frog and barked.

S.FORM: hiza ka ray 'izo' takem raiw ila tkaw ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka raj ʔiz~ðoʔ takəm raiw ila tkaw ila.
S.FORM: hiza ka ray 'izo' takem raiw ila tkaw ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka raj ʔiz~ðoʔ takəm raiw ila tkaw ila.

TRANSL.notes: 在瓶子裡的青蛙跑掉了,跳(出來)了.

S.TRANSL: 在瓶子裡的青蛙跑掉了,跳 了.

TRANSL.notes: The frog inside the container left. (It) jumped (out).

S.TRANSL: The frog inside the container left. jumped .
The child lay on his stomach.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' rima' kiim ka takem ray binbinisitan 'izo' 'askanan ka takem.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ kiim ka takəm raj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ ʔas~θkanan ka takəm.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' rima' kiim ka takem ray binbinisitan 'izo' 'askanan ka takem.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ kiim ka takəm raj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ ʔas~θkanan ka takəm.
S.TRANSL: 狗去放青蛙的瓶子裡找青蛙.
The dog went to look for the frog inside the container where the frog had been kept.

S.FORM: ho hasa' ila ma al'oehaz ka binbinisitan.
S.PHON: ho has~θaʔ ila ma alʔœhaz~ð ka βinβinis~θitan.
S.FORM: ho hasa' ila ma al'oehaz ka binbinisitan.
S.PHON: ho has~θaʔ ila ma alʔœhaz~ð ka βinβinis~θitan.

TRANSL.notes: (牠)不能(把頭)從瓶子中拿出來.

S.TRANSL: 不能 從瓶子中拿出來.

TRANSL.notes: (It) cannot take out (its head) from the container.

S.TRANSL: cannot take out from the container.

TRANSL.notes: Its head got stuck (inside the container).

S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila i ʔik loβih ka taʔœlœh.
ʔokaʔ ila i ʔik loβih ka taʔœlœh.

TRANSL.notes: (The dog) cannot pull out its head.

S.FORM: haysia ila rihao 'izo' noka korkoring ila kita'en ma ra lakayen ka hiza' ka binbinisitan.
S.PHON: hajs~θia ila rihao ʔiz~ðoʔ noka korkoriŋ ila kitaʔən ma ra lakajən ka hiz~ðaʔ ka βinβinis~θitan.
S.FORM: haysia ila rihao 'izo' noka korkoring ila kita'en ma ra lakayen ka hiza' ka binbinisitan.
S.PHON: hajs~θia ila rihao ʔiz~ðoʔ noka korkoriŋ ila kitaʔən ma ra lakajən ka hiz~ðaʔ ka βinβinis~θitan.

TRANSL.notes: (The dog tried to) break the container.

S.FORM: ma mari'in ila 'al'aloehaezen ila ka ta'oeloeh noka i noka 'aehoe' a.
S.PHON: ma mariʔin ila ʔalʔalœhæz~ðən ila ka taʔœlœh noka i noka ʔæhœʔ a.
S.FORM: ma mari'in ila 'al'aloehaezen ila ka ta'oeloeh noka i noka 'aehoe' a.
S.PHON: ma mariʔin ila ʔalʔalœhæz~ðən ila ka taʔœlœh noka i noka ʔæhœʔ a.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) pulled the dog's head out (of the container).
The child held (the dog) with arms.

S.FORM: sia ki 'aehoe' korkoring rima' ila kiim ka takem.
S.PHON: s~θia ki ʔæhœʔ korkoriŋ rimaʔ ila kiim ka takəm.
S.FORM: sia ki 'aehoe' korkoring rima' ila kiim ka takem.
S.PHON: s~θia ki ʔæhœʔ korkoriŋ rimaʔ ila kiim ka takəm.
S.TRANSL: The child and the dog went to look for the frog.

S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ʔœʔœ raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan kiim ka takəm.
ʔœʔœ ʔœʔœ raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan kiim ka takəm.

TRANSL.notes: (They) called and called toward the woods looking for the frog.

S.TRANSL: called and called toward the woods looking for the frog.

S.PHON: korkoriŋ ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ toβoŋ ka βojaʔ.
korkoriŋ ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ toβoŋ ka βojaʔ.
S.TRANSL: The child and the dog called at the hive.

S.FORM: korkoring rima' kita' ka inoka aewhaes a ka hoeroe'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ rimaʔ kitaʔ ka inoka æwhæs~θ a ka hœrœʔ.
S.FORM: korkoring rima' kita' ka inoka aewhaes a ka hoeroe'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ rimaʔ kitaʔ ka inoka æwhæs~θ a ka hœrœʔ.
S.TRANSL: The child went to see a rat hole.

S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka βojaʔ raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan.
ʔæhœʔ ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka βojaʔ raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan.
S.TRANSL: 狗看到一個蜂窩在樹林裡.
The dog saw a beehive in the woods.

S.FORM: hini' ka korkoring ta'itol ray kaehoey babaw kita' ka hoeroe' ray kaehoey.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka korkoriŋ taʔitol raj kæhœj βaβaw kitaʔ ka hœrœʔ raj kæhœj.
S.FORM: hini' ka korkoring ta'itol ray kaehoey babaw kita' ka hoeroe' ray kaehoey.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka korkoriŋ taʔitol raj kæhœj βaβaw kitaʔ ka hœrœʔ raj kæhœj.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬上樹,看到一個洞.
The child climbed up the tree and saw a hole.

S.FORM: kita'en hiza' ka 'oewi' ka sathang ila.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiz~ðaʔ ka ʔœwiʔ ka s~θathaŋ ila.
S.FORM: kita'en hiza' ka 'oewi' ka sathang ila.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiz~ðaʔ ka ʔœwiʔ ka s~θathaŋ ila.

TRANSL.notes: (He) saw the owl appear (from the hole).

S.TRANSL: The child was frightened and fell down.
He went to look for the frog.

S.FORM: 'okik raam hiza ka pakoSa kaehoey inoka wae'ae' ka.
S.PHON: ʔokik raam hiz~ða ka pakoʃa kæhœj inoka wæʔæʔ ka.
S.FORM: 'okik raam hiza ka pakoSa kaehoey inoka wae'ae' ka.
S.PHON: ʔokik raam hiz~ða ka pakoʃa kæhœj inoka wæʔæʔ ka.

TRANSL.notes: (He) did't realize that there was a deer antler (behind) the tree.

S.TRANSL: did't realize that there was a deer antler the tree.

TRANSL.notes: 鹿使(小孩)垂吊(在他身上).
The deer caused (the child) to hang on it.

S.TRANSL: The deer caused to hang on it.

S.FORM: sipanraan ila 'araSen ila hiza' 'aehoe' noka wae'ae' 'araSen.
S.PHON: s~θipanraan ila ʔaraʃən ila hiz~ðaʔ ʔæhœʔ noka wæʔæʔ ʔaraʃən.
S.FORM: sipanraan ila 'araSen ila hiza' 'aehoe' noka wae'ae' 'araSen.
S.PHON: s~θipanraan ila ʔaraʃən ila hiz~ðaʔ ʔæhœʔ noka wæʔæʔ ʔaraʃən.
S.TRANSL: 狗跟著被鹿帶走的小孩.
The dog followed the child being taken away by the deer.

S.PHON: s~θiʔos~θa ila hato kamas~θal raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan.
s~θiʔos~θa ila hato kamas~θal raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan.
S.TRANSL: 把 丟到森林的下面.

TRANSL.notes: (The deer) threw (the child) down in the woods.

S.FORM: rima' s sahae' ray iniya ralom 'insa'an sia ki 'aehoe' sia totoko' ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: rimaʔ s~θ s~θahæʔ raj inija ralom ʔins~θaʔan s~θia ki ʔæhœʔ s~θia totokoʔ ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.FORM: rima' s sahae' ray iniya ralom 'insa'an sia ki 'aehoe' sia totoko' ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: rimaʔ s~θ s~θahæʔ raj inija ralom ʔins~θaʔan s~θia ki ʔæhœʔ s~θia totokoʔ ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他掉到水中. 過了一會兒,他揹著狗.
He fell into the water. In a while, he carried the dog on his back.

S.FORM: sa kano' ray hani sa homngas ray kaehoey 'izo'.
S.PHON: s~θa kanoʔ raj hani s~θa homŋas~θ raj kæhœj ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.FORM: sa kano' ray hani sa homngas ray kaehoey 'izo'.
S.PHON: s~θa kanoʔ raj hani s~θa homŋas~θ raj kæhœj ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 從樹裡面傳出來的是什麼聲音?
What sound is it coming from inside the tree?

S.FORM: o ay 'i ayh iniya ralom hao hayza' ka kaehoey.
S.PHON: o aj ʔi ajh inija ralom hao hajz~ðaʔ ka kæhœj.
S.FORM: o ay 'i ayh iniya ralom hao hayza' ka kaehoey.
S.PHON: o aj ʔi ajh inija ralom hao hajz~ðaʔ ka kæhœj.
S.TRANSL: There is a piece of wood on the water.

S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ʔæhœʔ toβoŋ hiz~ða ka mæʔijæh.
hiz~ðaʔ ʔæhœʔ toβoŋ hiz~ða ka mæʔijæh.

S.FORM: sa 'iya himi sa 'iya tobong sa kakita' kano' hani 'izo' a'.
S.PHON: s~θa ʔija himi s~θa ʔija toβoŋ s~θa kakitaʔ kanoʔ hani ʔiz~ðoʔ aʔ.
S.FORM: sa 'iya himi sa 'iya tobong sa kakita' kano' hani 'izo' a'.
S.PHON: s~θa ʔija himi s~θa ʔija toβoŋ s~θa kakitaʔ kanoʔ hani ʔiz~ðoʔ aʔ.

TRANSL.notes: They kept quiet and called out and saw (something).What is here inside?

S.TRANSL: They kept quiet and called out and saw .What is here inside?

TRANSL.notes: (He) went to see and saw a frog.

S.TRANSL: went to see and saw a frog.

S.FORM: kitkitaen sa kin 'akoy ila sa mwai' sa kitaen kin nasia rakepen takem sa u 'akoy 'atomalan ila.
S.PHON: kitkitæn s~θa kin ʔakoj ila s~θa mwaiʔ s~θa kitæn kin nas~θia rakəpən takəm s~θa * ʔakoj ʔatomalan ila.
S.FORM: kitkitaen sa kin 'akoy ila sa mwai' sa kitaen kin nasia rakepen takem sa u 'akoy 'atomalan ila.
S.PHON: kitkitæn s~θa kin ʔakoj ila s~θa mwaiʔ s~θa kitæn kin nas~θia rakəpən takəm s~θa * ʔakoj ʔatomalan ila.
S.TRANSL: 看到很多青蛙,並抓了牠們.

TRANSL.notes: (He) saw many frogs and caught them. There were so many of them.

S.TRANSL: saw many frogs and caught them. There were so many of them.
